00 00 00 00
d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00
02 00 00

aa
24 00
56 30 30 31
00 00 00 00
d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00
02 00 00

#disable send
aa 18 00 56 30 30 31 00 00 00 00 d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00 02 00 00 F7 A4
#enable send
aa 18 00 56 30 30 31 00 00 00 00 d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00 02 00 01 37 65

#log node
aa 18 00 56 30 30 31 00 00 00 00 d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00 FD FF 00 37 D5
aa 18 00 56 30 30 31 00 00 00 00 d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00 FD FF 03 36 95
aa 18 00 56 30 30 31 00 00 00 00 d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00 FD FF 04 F4 D4


#0x7E enable send
aa 17 00 56 30 30 31 00 00 00 00 d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00 7E 00 1B 3E

#0x7E disable send
aa 17 00 56 30 30 31 00 00 00 00 d3 65 34 00 00 00 00 00 7F 00 8B 3F
